title: Can someone please advise regarding a formula that adds two columns (or more) and then multiplies that added sum by another column?

Hey @brianwbates, I can definitely help out!

So to start you’ll need to add a formula column. Once you do, you can add a formula between the columns as shown below:

2021-08-18 (5)1808×1283 122 KB

This should give you the result you’re looking for!
